seoTitle: Rogues Point vs Rose Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Rogues Point and Rose Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Rogues Point vs Rose Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Rogues Point and Rose Park.
heading: Rogues Point vs Rose Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Rogues Point, South Australia and Rose Park, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Rogues Point has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Rose Park (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Rogues Point or Rose Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Rogues Point has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Rose Park scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Rogues Point scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Rose Park scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Rogues Point or Rose Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Rogues Point has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
